f8_boot_enable.description: Enable legacy F8 boot menu options during system startup

f8_boot_disable.description: Disable legacy F8 boot menu and use modern recovery

legacy_media.description: Enable Windows Media Player and DirectPlay legacy components

nfs.description: Enable Services for NFS to access UNIX file shares

registry_backup.description: Schedule a daily registry backup task at 12:30 AM

sandbox.description: Enable Windows Sandbox for safe application testing

wsl.description: Enable WSL2 and Virtual Machine Platform

reset_network.description: Reset TCP/IP stack, Winsock, and flush DNS
reset_network.script: netsh winsock reset; netsh int ip reset; ipconfig /release; ipconfig /renew; ipconfig /flushdns

ntp_server.description: Set Windows Time service to sync with pool.ntp.org

sfc_scan.description: Run SFC scan to check and repair system files

reset_wu.description: Reset Windows Update components to default
reset_wu.script: net stop wuauserv; net stop cryptSvc; net stop bits; net stop msiserver; Ren C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution SoftwareDistribution.old; Ren C:\Windows\System32\catroot2 catroot2.old; net start wuauserv; net start cryptSvc; net start bits; net start msiserver

reinstall_winget.description: Reinstall WinGet package manager via App Installer
